page.title: SEO + GEO
page.description: See your traditional search and AI visibility scores side-by-side, and how they move together

correlation.title: Are they moving together?

label.earlyReading: Early reading — not yet statistically reliable

correlation.earlyReadingHint: We have {n} aligned {granularity} snapshots. We need at least 10 before we label this relationship

direction.positive: Scores tend to rise and fall together
direction.negative: Scores tend to move in opposite directions

correlation.caveat: Correlation is not causation. Many factors can move both scores in the same direction.
correlation.insufficientDataHint: We need at least 6 aligned {granularity} snapshots to compute a coefficient

mapping.hint: Lines mark factors with conceptually similar inputs

queries.title: Per-query view
queries.description: Queries ranked by the gap between traditional-search signal and AI-citation signal

gapSignalHint.high_seo_no_ai: Visitors are finding you via search — but AI Overviews aren't citing you on this query yet
gapSignalHint.high_ai_no_seo: AI Overviews cite you — but your traditional search listing isn't drawing traffic
gapSignalHint.balanced: Both channels are working — protect your position
gapSignalHint.no_signal: Not enough data yet to categorize this query

empty.title: No query data yet
empty.description: Once GSC has synced and prompts have produced citations in the selected period, queries will appear here

recommendations.title: Top recommendations
recommendations.description: Interleaved from both the SEO and GEO engines and sorted by estimated lift
recommendations.empty: No recommendations — both scores are strong
recommendations.partialFailure: Showing recommendations from one side only — we couldn't compute the other side

NO_SEO_SNAPSHOTS.title: SEO score not available yet
NO_SEO_SNAPSHOTS.description: Compute an SEO score for this brand to see the dual view

NO_GEO_SNAPSHOTS.title: GEO score not available yet
NO_GEO_SNAPSHOTS.description: Compute a GEO score for this brand to see the dual view

NO_SNAPSHOTS.title: No scores yet
NO_SNAPSHOTS.description: Once SEO and GEO snapshots exist for this brand, the dual view will appear here
